positive: A seamless repeating pattern combining stylized celestial elements, such as crescent moons and delicate star constellations, interwoven with gracefully drawn botanical motifs, like stylized ferns and tropical leaves. The style must be highly graphic and minimalist, evoking the aesthetic of mid-century modern linocut prints and vector art. Use strong, deep indigo and burnt orange colors set against a creamy off-white background. The composition requires clean silhouettes, sharp contrast, and a central, repeating arrangement perfect for apparel printing. High detail, flat graphic style, perfect for textile print.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, imperfect symmetry, bad anatomy, low detail, gradient, photorealistic, oil painting, watercolor
